title: Capsule Network Research
description: Independent research project exploring capsule networks as an alternative to CNNs for image classification, evaluating their ability to preserve spatial hierarchies and pose information between features.
longDescription: Independent research project exploring capsule networks as an alternative to convolutional neural networks for image classification. Capsule networks encode both the presence and the pose (position, orientation, scale) of a feature, using dynamic routing-by-agreement between capsule layers instead of max-pooling. The project implemented a capsule network in TensorFlow, benchmarked it against a comparable CNN on the same dataset, and evaluated how well each preserved spatial hierarchies between parts and wholes under viewpoint changes.

title: Astro Seed — Crop Health Classifier
description: A machine learning model that classifies crop health from leaf imagery to help identify plant disease early, built as part of an agriculture-tech research effort.
longDescription: A machine learning model that classifies crop health from leaf imagery to help identify plant disease early, built as part of an agriculture-tech research effort. The model was trained on labeled leaf-image datasets and evaluated across multiple architectures (built in both TensorFlow and PyTorch) to compare accuracy and inference speed trade-offs for a future field-deployable, low-power classifier.

title: EIT Research — Arduino Sensing Device
description: Designed and built an Arduino-based sensing device as part of Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) research, handling signal acquisition and low-level firmware.
longDescription: Designed and built an Arduino-based sensing device as part of Electrical Impedance Tomography (EIT) research. Work spanned the full stack of the device: analog signal acquisition circuitry, low-level C++ firmware for driving electrode arrays and sampling voltage, and a Python-based host-side pipeline for reconstructing impedance data into images.

title: Portfolio-Netflix (This Site)
description: A Netflix-styled personal portfolio site built with React, TypeScript, and Vite — profile selection, animated landing page, and content pages themed as a streaming catalog.
longDescription: A Netflix-styled personal portfolio site built with React, TypeScript, and Vite. Visitors pick a "profile" (recruiter or developer) the way you'd pick a Netflix profile, and the rest of the site — banner copy, project ordering, calls to action — adapts to that audience. Content lives in a typed JSON data layer decoupled from the components, deployed automatically to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions on every push to main.
